wiki.summary: Marked as the only explicit track on Fancy That with the sample of the 2021 song “Who Want Smoke?” by Nardo Wick, “Noises” explains the feeling of uneasiness while being home alone. PinkPantheress hears strange sounds and starts to feel scared, developing fear and paranoia, questioning if someone is watching her. According to an interview with Spotify UK, PinkPantheress felt most comfortable and relaxed during the recording session for “Noises” Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Marked as the only explicit track on Fancy That with the sample of the 2021 song “Who Want Smoke?” by Nardo Wick, “Noises” explains the feeling of uneasiness while being home alone. PinkPantheress hears strange sounds and starts to feel scared, developing fear and paranoia, questioning if someone is watching her. According to an interview with Spotify UK, PinkPantheress felt most comfortable and relaxed during the recording session for “Noises” as she preferred to rely on her best production abilities rather than following a specific standard, comparing it to her debut mixtape to hell with it. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
